'''Sonnos''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who lived during the first years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. After the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Deggar Feps]] angered Sonnos, he attempted to flee the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Lost Lady]]'', hoping to escape from the Hutt.
